creator: freebsd-maintainer@opera.com
text:
This is still an issue with llvm-gcc 2.5. Would be very nice if this can  
be fixed, it looks like some files just need to be compiled with -fPIC,  
but I'm not sure where to change stuff in the gcc Makefiles.

See also: http://bugs.debian.org/cgi-bin/bugreport.cgi?bug=490432 .

Arjan
